title: Sunday Morning Worship
description: Join us every Sunday at 10:30 AM for worship at Goodwill Presbyterian Church.

title: Wednesday Bible Study
description: Weekly Zoom Bible Study begins at 6:30 PM.

title: Celebrations, Accomplishments & Thanksgiving Recognition
content:
The congregation is invited to submit photographs and announcements recognizing the accomplishments of children, grandchildren, relatives, and loved ones for upcoming celebrations, acknowledgments, and prayers of thanksgiving.

Examples may include:

- Graduations
- Academic honors
- Awards and recognitions

This special time is set aside to honor and thank God for His protection, guidance, and godly wisdom over our children and families, and to celebrate the loving village of parents, grandparents, relatives, educators, mentors, church members, and community supporters who help nurture our young people as they grow in grace, wisdom, faith, and understanding.

Please submit all information and photographs by Thursday, May 29, 2026, for inclusion in upcoming church communications and recognitions.
